title: Meteorological Service Singapore Advances Weather Forecasting with New Supercomputer from Hewlett Packard Enterprise
text: SINGAPORE–(BUSINESS WIRE)–Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE: HPE) today announced that it has built a new supercomputer for the Meteorological Service Singapore (MSS) to advance weather forecasting and tropical climate research for Singapore and the broader Southeast Asia region. The new supercomputer replaces MSS’ existing system, delivering nearly twice as much performance and advanced capabilities across compute, […]...

title: Meteorological Service Singapore Advances Weather Forecasting with New Supercomputer from Hewlett Packard Enterprise
text: SINGAPORE--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE: HPE) today announced that it has built a new supercomputer for the Meteorological Service Singapore (MSS) to advance weather forecasting and tropical climate research for Singapore and the broader Southeast Asia region.

title: Hewlett Packard's (HPE) FY23 Earnings Guidance Lags Estimates
text: Hewlett Packard's (HPE) outlook for fiscal 2023 reflects continued growth momentum from fiscal 2022, driven primarily by the strong demand for its newer services.

title: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Demonstrates Strong Momentum of Edge-to-Cloud Strategy and Presents FY23 Outlook at HPE Securities Analyst Meeting 2022
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--HPE today hosted its annual Securities Analyst Meeting, where executives provided an FY23 financial outlook and updates on the company's strategy.

title: AMD Initiative to Address High-Growth Markets Aid Prospects
text: Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) collaborates with the Energy Sciences Network to launch ESnet6, the latest generation of the U.S. Department of Energy's high-performance network.

title: HPE to Offer Data-Driven Cloud Solutions to Belgium's AG
text: Hewlett Packard (HPE) accelerates Belgium-based AG's digitization journey by designing, developing, implementing and migrating its existing infrastructure into a cloud-based modernized infrastructure.

title: Hewlett Packard (HPE) Builds Supercomputer for UAE's MBZUAI
text: Hewlett Packard (HPE) is building a supercomputer for the UAE's MBZUAI in support of the country's National Strategy for AI program to accelerate AI-driven scientific discovery.

title: Aruba Signs Managed Service Provider (MSP) Partnership Agreement with OmniClouds
text: DUBAI, UAE / ACCESSWIRE / October 11, 2022: Aruba, a Hewlett Packard Enterprise company (NYSE:HPE), and OmniClouds ( www.OmniClouds.com ), a leading technology start-up in the cloud service provider (CSP) space and migrator for MEA & Emerging markets, today signed a strategic Managed Service Provider (MSP) agreement to drive digital transformation and ICT as a service in the Middle East & Africa region. The signing took place during GITEX Global 2022.

title: Mohamed bin Zayed University of Artificial Intelligence Advances the UAE's National Strategy for AI with New Supercomputer Built by Hewlett Packard Enterprise
text: DUBAI, United Arab Emirates--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE: HPE) today announced it is building a new supercomputer for Mohamed bin Zayed University of Artificial Intelligence (MBZUAI), a university dedicated solely to AI, to accelerate AI-driven scientific discovery and advance the UAE's goal to be a global AI leader. title: HPE Accelerates AG Digital Transformation and Business Outcomes with Cloud-Ready and Data-Driven Solution
text: BRUXELLES, Belgium--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE: HPE) today announced that leading Belgium insurance provider AG has selected HPE to design, develop, implement and migrate all of AG's applications onto a more cost-efficient and flexible open systems solution to replace its historical and aging mainframe. title: Hewlett Packard Enterprise to Webcast HPE Securities Analyst Meeting 2022
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hewlett Packard Enterprise's HPE Securities Analyst Meeting 2022 is scheduled for October 19, 2022.
